title: Gem scaffold: gemspec, lib/ structure, Rakefile, README
RSpec/Minitest test helpers + full test suite

feat: cloud sync backend for audit_tail gem
description:
Add cloud sync support to the audit_tail gem so events written locally are also POSTed to audit_tail_cloud.

What's needed:
1. config.cloud_api_key and config.cloud_sync_url options in Configuration
2. HTTP backend (lib/audit_tail/backends/http.rb) that maps AuditTail::Event attributes to the cloud payload shape
3. CloudSyncJob (ActiveJob) that batches and POSTs events to POST /api/v1/events with bearer auth
4. Hook the backend into ModelCallbacks and Log so events are synced after local write
5. Tests

Cloud API: POST /api/v1/events, Authorization: Bearer <key>, body: {events: [...]}, max 1000/batch
Payload fields: action, actor_type, actor_id, actor_display, subject_type, subject_id, subject_display, changeset, metadata, occurred_at, environment
